title: Ring of Fear
director: James Edward Grant, William A. Wellman
writer: Paul Fix, Philip MacDonald, James Edward Grant
actors: Clyde Beatty, Pat O'Brien, Mickey Spillane
plot: The Clyde Beatty Circus seems jinxed, falling victim again and again to apparent accidents which are actually the acts of a murderous saboteur. Mystery writer Mickey Spillane comes on the scene to solve the case.
